tasks.title: Update README and zeus-execute-v2.md with subagent setup instructions
tasks.title_en: Update README and zeus-execute-v2.md with subagent setup instructions
tasks.title_zh: 用子代理设置说明更新 README 和 zeus-execute-v2.md

tasks.title: Implement ZeusOrchestrator._bootstrap_workspace to auto-inject identity files into agent workspaces
tasks.description: Add _bootstrap_workspace method that copies AGENTS.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, and SOUL.md from project_root into the agent workspace. Support config.json override via subagent.bootstrap.files. Emit task.bootstrapped event.
tasks.title_en: Implement ZeusOrchestrator._bootstrap_workspace to auto-inject identity files into agent workspaces
tasks.title_zh: 实现 ZeusOrchestrator._bootstrap_workspace，自动注入身份文件到代理工作区
tasks.description_en: Add _bootstrap_workspace method that copies AGENTS.md, USER.md, IDENTITY.md, and SOUL.md from project_root into the agent workspace. Support config.json override via subagent.bootstrap.files. Emit task.bootstrapped event.
tasks.description_zh: 添加 _bootstrap_workspace 方法，将 AGENTS.md、USER.md、IDENTITY.md 和 SOUL.md 从项目根目录复制到代理工作区。支持通过 config.json 的 subagent.bootstrap.files 进行覆盖。发射 task.bootstrapped 事件。

tasks.title: Add unit tests for workspace bootstrap default behavior and config override
tasks.description: Verify that existing identity files are copied, missing files are skipped, and config override changes the file list.
tasks.title_en: Add unit tests for workspace bootstrap default behavior and config override
tasks.title_zh: 为工作区引导默认行为和配置覆盖添加单元测试
tasks.description_en: Verify that existing identity files are copied, missing files are skipped, and config override changes the file list.
tasks.description_zh: 验证现有身份文件是否被复制、缺失文件是否被跳过，以及配置覆盖是否改变文件列表。

tasks.title: Update zeus-execute-v2.md with workspace bootstrap documentation
tasks.description: Document the automatic identity file injection and the optional subagent.bootstrap.files configuration.
tasks.title_en: Update zeus-execute-v2.md with workspace bootstrap documentation
tasks.title_zh: 在 zeus-execute-v2.md 中更新工作区引导文档
tasks.description_en: Document the automatic identity file injection and the optional subagent.bootstrap.files configuration.
tasks.description_zh: 记录自动身份文件注入和可选的 subagent.bootstrap.files 配置。

tasks.title: Add /milestones endpoint and Milestones tab to Web UI
tasks.description: Implement GET /milestones in zeus_server.py that reads roadmap.json and task.json to return milestone progress. Add a new Milestones tab in index.html showing milestone cards with expandable task lists and per-milestone progress bars.
tasks.title_en: Add /milestones endpoint and Milestones tab to Web UI
tasks.title_zh: 添加 /milestones 端点并在 Web UI 中新增 Milestones 标签页
tasks.description_en: Implement GET /milestones in zeus_server.py that reads roadmap.json and task.json to return milestone progress. Add a new Milestones tab in index.html showing milestone cards with expandable task lists and per-milestone progress bars.
tasks.description_zh: 在 zeus_server.py 中实现 GET /milestones，读取 roadmap.json 和 task.json 返回里程碑进度。在 index.html 中添加新的 Milestones 标签页，展示里程碑卡片、可展开任务列表和每个里程碑的进度条。

tasks.title: Extend task schema and Web UI with multi-language support (EN/ZH)
tasks.description: Add optional title_en, title_zh, description_en, description_zh to task.schema.json. Update zeus_server.py endpoints to return these fields. Add a language toggle in the Web UI header and a getLocalized helper so task titles/descriptions switch instantly with fallback.
tasks.title_en: Extend task schema and Web UI with multi-language support (EN/ZH)
tasks.title_zh: 扩展任务模式与 Web UI 多语言支持（英/中）
tasks.description_en: Add optional title_en, title_zh, description_en, description_zh to task.schema.json. Update zeus_server.py endpoints to return these fields. Add a language toggle in the Web UI header and a getLocalized helper so task titles/descriptions switch instantly with fallback.
tasks.description_zh: 为 task.schema.json 添加可选的 title_en、title_zh、description_en、description_zh。更新 zeus_server.py 端点以返回这些字段。在 Web UI 标题栏中添加语言切换按钮和 getLocalized 辅助函数，使任务标题/描述能够即时切换并优雅回退。

tasks.title: Seed i18n data for all v2 tasks and update documentation
tasks.description: Populate title_en/title_zh/description_en/description_zh for all existing v2 tasks. Update zeus-execute-v2.md with i18n guidelines.
tasks.title_en: Seed i18n data for all v2 tasks and update documentation
tasks.title_zh: 为所有 v2 任务填充 i18n 数据并更新文档
tasks.description_en: Populate title_en/title_zh/description_en/description_zh for all existing v2 tasks. Update zeus-execute-v2.md with i18n guidelines.
tasks.description_zh: 为所有现有 v2 任务填充 title_en/title_zh/description_en/description_zh。更新 zeus-execute-v2.md 中的 i18n 指南。

tasks.title: Extend roadmap.json schema and add GET /phases endpoint
tasks.description: Add phases array to roadmap.json with title, summary, milestone_ids, wave_range. Implement GET /phases in zeus_server.py that computes status and progress_percent per phase.

tasks.title: Update Web UI with Phases tab, phase badge, and phase-aware wave selector
tasks.description: Add Phases tab to index.html showing phase cards with summaries and nested milestones. Add current phase badge in header. Make dashboard wave selector filter by selected phase.

tasks.title: Seed P-001/P-002 for existing v2 data and update task.json meta with current_phase
tasks.description: Populate phases in roadmap.json mapping M-001~M-004 to P-001 and M-005~M-008 to P-002. Update task.json meta to include current_phase.

tasks.title: Add tests for /phases and phase status rules; update documentation
tasks.description: Write unit/integration tests for GET /phases and phase status/progress calculation. Update zeus-execute-v2.md with phase layer guidelines.

tasks.title: Implement GlobalScheduler with quarantine and wave-as-view semantics
tasks.description: Refactor zeus_orchestrator.py to introduce GlobalScheduler. Maintain wave in task.json as planning/observation fields. Dispatch tasks by global dependency readiness. Failed tasks move to quarantine (task.json quarantine array or status field) and do not block unrelated downstream tasks.

tasks.title: Implement Agent Mailbox protocol in agent_bus.py
tasks.description: Extend agent_bus.py with send(to_agent_id, message) and receive(agent_id) APIs. Messages persisted as JSONL in .zeus/v2/agent-logs/mailbox/{to_agent_id}.jsonl. Support polling by agents in their workspace via a lightweight API or file watcher.

tasks.title: Agent-level isolated ai-logs directory structure
tasks.description: Change log layout from wave-centric to agent-centric: .zeus/v2/agent-logs/{agent_id}/activity.md and reasoning.jsonl. Update zeus_orchestrator.py dispatch logic and agent_bus event writers to write to agent-specific paths. Ensure backward compatibility for existing wave-logs.

tasks.title: Web UI Global Execution, Agent Collaboration, and per-agent log browser
tasks.description: Add Global Execution view (cross-wave running tasks). Add Agent Message Stream panel (real-time or polling mailbox display). Add per-agent log browser (select agent -> view activity.md / reasoning.jsonl). Update index.html and zeus_server.py with necessary endpoints.

tasks.title: Integration tests, backward-compatibility validation, and documentation
tasks.description: Write tests for GlobalScheduler quarantine behavior, mailbox delivery, and agent log isolation. Validate main track unaffected. Update zeus-execute-v2.md with global scheduling and agent collaboration guidelines.

tasks.title: Implement task lifecycle controls (retry, cancel, pause) in API and Web UI
tasks.description: Add POST endpoints for /tasks/{task_id}/retry, /cancel, /pause. Introduce task status model (pending|running|paused|completed|failed|cancelled). Add action buttons in Global Execution view. Write integration tests.
tasks.title_en: Implement task lifecycle controls (retry, cancel, pause) in API and Web UI
tasks.title_zh: 在 API 和 Web UI 中实现任务生命周期控制（重试、取消、暂停）
tasks.description_en: Add POST endpoints for /tasks/{task_id}/retry, /cancel, /pause. Introduce task status model (pending|running|paused|completed|failed|cancelled). Add action buttons in Global Execution view. Write integration tests.
tasks.description_zh: 添加 POST 端点支持任务重试、取消、暂停。引入当前任务状态模型（pending|running|paused|completed|failed|cancelled）。在全局执行页面添加操作按钮。编写集成测试。

tasks.title: Create Dockerfile and one-click start scripts for v2 backend deployment
tasks.description: Provide a Dockerfile that packages the v2 backend. Add start.sh (Linux/macOS) and start.ps1 (Windows) one-click scripts. Update README with deployment instructions. Verify local Docker build.
tasks.title_en: Create Dockerfile and one-click start scripts for v2 backend deployment
tasks.title_zh: 为 v2 后端部署创建 Dockerfile 和一键启动脚本
tasks.description_en: Provide a Dockerfile that packages the v2 backend. Add start.sh (Linux/macOS) and start.ps1 (Windows) one-click scripts. Update README with deployment instructions. Verify local Docker build.
tasks.description_zh: 提供打包 v2 后端的 Dockerfile。添加 start.sh 和 start.ps1 一键启动脚本。更新 README 部署说明。验证本地 Docker 构建。

tasks.title: Implement SQLite persistence core (scheduler_state.py)
tasks.description: Create SchedulerStateDB class with tables for meta, active_tasks, and mailbox. Provide save/load APIs. Add unit tests in test_scheduler_state.py.
tasks.title_en: Implement SQLite persistence core (scheduler_state.py)
tasks.title_zh: 实现 SQLite 持久化核心（scheduler_state.py）
tasks.description_en: Create SchedulerStateDB class with tables for meta, active_tasks, and mailbox. Provide save/load APIs. Add unit tests in test_scheduler_state.py.
tasks.description_zh: 创建 SchedulerStateDB 类，包含 meta、active_tasks、mailbox 三张表。提供 save/load API。添加 test_scheduler_state.py 单元测试。

tasks.title: Add graceful shutdown and SIGTERM handlers
tasks.description: Register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers in zeus_server.py and add stop_global_scheduler() in zeus_orchestrator.py. Persist scheduler state to SQLite on shutdown.
tasks.title_en: Add graceful shutdown and SIGTERM handlers
tasks.title_zh: 添加优雅关闭和 SIGTERM 处理器
tasks.description_en: Register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers in zeus_server.py and add stop_global_scheduler() in zeus_orchestrator.py. Persist scheduler state to SQLite on shutdown.
tasks.description_zh: 在 zeus_server.py 中注册 SIGTERM/SIGINT 处理器，在 zeus_orchestrator.py 中添加 stop_global_scheduler()。关闭时将调度器状态持久化到 SQLite。

tasks.title: Implement state resume on startup in orchestrator and server
tasks.description: On server startup, detect scheduler_active from SQLite. Add resume_from_state() in zeus_orchestrator.py to recover or reset active tasks. Ensure /global/status reflects recovered state.
tasks.title_en: Implement state resume on startup in orchestrator and server
tasks.title_zh: 在调度器和服务端实现启动时状态恢复
tasks.description_en: On server startup, detect scheduler_active from SQLite. Add resume_from_state() in zeus_orchestrator.py to recover or reset active tasks. Ensure /global/status reflects recovered state.
tasks.description_zh: 服务器启动时检测 SQLite 中的 scheduler_active。在 zeus_orchestrator.py 中添加 resume_from_state() 恢复或重置活跃任务。确保 /global/status 正确反映恢复后的状态。

tasks.title: Add Web UI recovery banner and refreshed global status after resume
tasks.description: Update index.html to show a recovery banner when scheduler state was restored from SQLite. Refresh Global Execution view to display recovered running/pending/quarantine.
tasks.title_en: Add Web UI recovery banner and refreshed global status after resume
tasks.title_zh: 添加 Web UI 恢复提示横幅和刷新后的全局状态展示
tasks.description_en: Update index.html to show a recovery banner when scheduler state was restored from SQLite. Refresh Global Execution view to display recovered running/pending/quarantine.
tasks.description_zh: 更新 index.html，在从 SQLite 恢复调度器状态时显示恢复提示横幅。刷新 Global Execution 视图以展示恢复后的运行中/待执行/隔离区状态。

tasks.title: Write integration tests for shutdown-resume cycle and update docs
tasks.description: Add tests in test_server.py covering shutdown -> restart -> state recovery. Update zeus-execute-v2.md and claude-progress.md.
tasks.title_en: Write integration tests for shutdown-resume cycle and update docs
tasks.title_zh: 编写关闭-恢复周期的集成测试并更新文档
tasks.description_en: Add tests in test_server.py covering shutdown -> restart -> state recovery. Update zeus-execute-v2.md and claude-progress.md.
tasks.description_zh: 在 test_server.py 中添加覆盖关闭->重启->状态恢复的测试。更新 zeus-execute-v2.md 和 claude-progress.md。
